templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.staples.com/deals/Clearance-Deals/BI1278394

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $25. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@staples.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We ship via UPS and we'll provide you with an estimated delivery date when you place your order. You will also be notified of the estimated delivery date in your confirmation email.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our affiliate program here: https://www.staples.com/sbd/content/about/affiliate/

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: We can apply a coupon to an order within 48 hours after placing the order. Please email us at help@staples.com or give us a call at 1 (800) 333-3330. Our team is more than happy to look into this for you!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at help@staples.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://stores.staples.com/index.html

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content:
You can give us a call at 1 (800) 333-3330, Mon - Fri, 8 am - 10 pm and
Sat - Sun, 9 am - 8 pm ET, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Coupons not yet qualified
templates.content: Some coupons will not be viewable in your cart until you meet the specified qualification (e.g. minimum spend amount) and proceed to checkout. You will see a not qualified yet alert when this is the case. Refer to the coupon details to ensure the qualifications are met, once met you will see the amount applied at checkout.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can unlock up to 5% back in rewards, get member-exclusive deals, and much more. Check it out here: https://www.staples.com/grs/rewards/programoverview

templates.name: Coupon not associated with account
templates.content: If you receive an error message that says the coupon "is not associated with this account," it's because this coupon code applies to a specific account number and you may need to log in. If you are logged in and the coupon still does not apply, then it is not associated for use with your account number.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Due to how quickly we process orders, I'm afraid we cannot make any changes to orders or payment methods once they're submitted. However, you can cancel or edit your ship-to on most orders within 30 minutes. In order to cancel your order please follow the steps on this link: https://www.staples.com/hc?id=4dd9be66-1f23-4cca-8ea3-a9e540fa3b77

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.staples.com/sbd/cre/help-center/returns-policy/

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on FB: https://www.facebook.com/staples and Twitter here: https://twitter.com/staples

templates.name: Order status / Tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.staples.com/ptd/myorders
